form.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 300m at Healesville by 0.9 lengths in a Grade 5. Top chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 300m at Healesville by 0.9 lengths in a Grade 5. Top chance again.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (22.80) at big odds over 390m at this track. Draws an inside box and capable of a better result.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 400m at Warragul beaten 4 lengths (23.27) behind Special Players in a Grade 5 on April 9. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 400m at Warragul beaten 4 lengths (23.27) behind Special Players in a Grade 5 on April 9. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 390m at this track clocking 22.57. Has ability and among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 390m at this track clocking 22.57. Has ability and among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warragul (23.40) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length sixth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warragul (23.40) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length sixth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a seventh over 425m at Bendigo. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (22.80) over 390m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (22.80) over 390m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Bendigo then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fifth (22.71) at this track. Looks a definite winning chance on best and given another chance.
